opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is cramping violently, it is blown up like a balloon, and I alternate between severe constipation and sudden diarrhoea.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It flared up badly tonight after a really stressful day — the cramps are agonising and my belly is hugely swollen, and I'm frightened it's a blockage or something catastrophic that can't wait until morning.

symptom_narrative.onset: the severe cramping and visible swelling came on this evening after a period of intense personal stress; the underlying pattern of pain and unpredictable bowels has been going on for about 4 years
symptom_narrative.duration: the acute severe flare has been building over the last several hours tonight
symptom_narrative.character: violent, gripping cramps that come in waves, with a tight blown-up feeling and a lot of trapped wind; my belly looks and feels much bigger than normal
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the cramps are agonising and the swelling is immense — it is frightening and I keep doubling over
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across my whole tummy, but the cramps are worst low down on the left side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the pain comes and goes in spasms and is tied to going to the toilet — it eases a bit after I open my bowels; it's much worse when I'm stressed
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: a heat pack on my belly, and it settles a little after passing wind or a bowel motion
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: stress, and it has been building all evening
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've passed some clear jelly-like mucus, and I feel a constant sense that I haven't fully emptied my bowels
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had recurrent bouts of this cramping and unpredictable bowels — swinging between constipation and diarrhoea — for around 4 years, usually a few days most weeks
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can still walk around but I keep bending over and clutching my stomach when the spasms hit

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing recurrent tummy cramps with unpredictable bowels swinging between constipation and diarrhoea, for about 4 years
past_medical_history.how_managed: never fully worked up; I just cope with it and it comes and goes

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I've been under intense personal stress and a very stressful event triggered this tonight; I'm extremely anxious that something serious is going on

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants to be reassured it is not a bowel obstruction, cancer or a surgical emergency

communication_style.typical_message_style: anxious and frightened, focused on the fear of a catastrophic cause

objective_data_offered.value: abdomen looks visibly swollen and rounded; patient keeps bending forward and clutching her stomach during spasms and has a heat pack held against her belly; she is talking in full sentences and does not look breathless or blue
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: visual impression over a video/photo only; cannot assess whether the swelling is gas, fluid or a mass, and cannot feel the abdomen
single reading on an uncalibrated home cuff; patient is in pain and anxious, which can raise blood pressure
single reading; anxiety and pain can raise heart rate
single reading on an uncalibrated home device

objective_data_offered.value: a heat pack is applied to the abdomen for the cramps
